strictParityRule: No new mechanics, items, recipes, GUI progression or fake visual effects were added. Changes are original TC4 asset/model/HUD renderer binding and cleanup adapters for Forge 1.19.2.
changes: Thaumometer renderer now uses a direct numeric Forge 1.19.2 adapter for original scanner.obj: 24 vertices, 58 UV coordinates, 24 quads, with original models/scanner.png.
Removed the previous flat Thaumometer slab renderer path.
Goggles of Revealing player layer now renders multiple front/rim/side/back planes using original models/goggles.png instead of a single flat sticker/vanilla helmet placeholder.
Aura Node HUD now draws original node_bubble.png and the proper frame from original misc/nodes.png inside the revealer HUD, while preserving existing node data only.
Aura Node in-world renderer no longer calls the fake aspect-icon orbital overlay in this parity pass; it stays restricted to original nodes.png + node_bubble.png layers.

Copied a wider set of core active textures from the original TC4 asset bank: GUI hud/book/workbench/research table, goggles, scanner, scribing tools, research note, quicksilver, phial, traveller boots, wand caps and wand core icons.
Added Stage403-422 audit and wired it into GitHub Actions before jar build.
notDoneYet: Full ModelGoggles Java model parity is still an adapter, not the exact 1.7.10 ModelRenderer class.
Aura Node alpha/blend/modifier/energized/stabilized visuals still need exact old TileNodeRenderer comparison.
Wand ModelWand UVs and cap/rod geometry need more pixel-level validation.
Research Table and Arcane Workbench slot coordinates still need deeper exact parity review beyond original texture binding.
Infusion Matrix crafting is present but still needs complete instability, failure, FX, all ConfigRecipes, enchantment and symmetry parity.
